name: Lowell Copper Ltd.
description: Lowell Copper Ltd. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of copper projects. Founded to leverage market conditions, the company aimed to build a portfolio of economic copper assets through a combination of exploration, mergers, and acquisitions. Led by industry veteran J. David Lowell, the company utilized extensive geological expertise to identify and develop high-potential copper properties, primarily operating within the Americas. The company was listed on the TSX Venture Exchange under the ticker symbol JDL.
